arts.ttl: Belief there’s ‘favourable’ route to signing Liverpool player – Star move possible
arts.sum: Luis Diaz has had an inconsistent season at Liverpool. While he has eight Premier League goals, he has scored only three in ten games and his output has declined, having not registered a single assist during this period. Despite the inconsistency, the Colombian has attracted attention from Barcelona. arts.ttl: Everton warned over shirt sponsor with gambling company set to close UK site
arts.sum: Everton are to receive a warning about their shirt sponsor Stake, with the Australian bookmaker set to withdraw from the UK in the next month after an investigation by the Gambling Commission

arts.ttl: Arsenal, Chelsea & Liverpool eye Huijsen - Wednesday's gossip
arts.sum: Three clubs are interested in Bournemouth's Dean Huijsen, Liverpool eye Nice winger Mohamed-Ali Cho, Chelsea prepare bid for Pablo Barrios, plus more.

arts.ttl: Liverpool to play just ONE Premier League game in five-week period after nightmare run

arts.ttl: Liverpool have Bundesliga in sights with 2 midfielders and 2 defenders named
arts.sum: Liverpool appear to have set their sights firmly on the Bundesliga as they look at four potential signings in the summer. That’s according to SportBILD, who say Liverpool have Hugo Larsson, Merlin Röhl, Castello Lukeba and Konstantinos Koulierakis on their list.
